	ldmatrix.sync.aligned.m8n8.x4.shared.b16 {%r4251, %r4252, %r4253, %r4254}, [%r4201];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	ldmatrix.sync.aligned.m8n8.x4.shared.b16 {%r4255, %r4256, %r4257, %r4258}, [%r4206];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p1 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd188 + 0 ], { %r4227, %r4228, %r4229, %r4230 };
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p2 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd189 + 0 ], { %r4231, %r4232, %r4233, %r4234 };
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p3 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd190 + 0 ], { %r4235, %r4236, %r4237, %r4238 };
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p4 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd191 + 0 ], { %r4239, %r4240, %r4241, %r4242 };
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p5 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd192 + 0 ], { %r4243, %r4244, %r4245, %r4246 };
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p6 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd193 + 0 ], { %r4247, %r4248, %r4249, %r4250 };
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p7 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd194 + 0 ], { %r4251, %r4252, %r4253, %r4254 };
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	@%p8 st.global.v4.b32 [ %rd195 + 0 ], { %r4255, %r4256, %r4257, %r4258 };
	// end inline asm
	.loc	1 165 4                         // prefill_attention.py:165:4
	ret;
$L__tmp7:
$L__func_end0:
                                        // -- End function
}
